content.content:
[{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667","pull_request_review_id":3963573319,"id":2949388667,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzBl7","diff_hunk":"@@ -75,6 +75,34 @@
       grim -g "$REGION" - | swappy -f -
     '')
 
+    # Monitor input switching via DDC/CI (Dell U4025QW)
+    # VCP code 0x60 = Input Source. Values are monitor-specific;
+    # run `ddcutil capabilities` and `ddcutil getvcp 60` to discover them.
+    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "monitor-input" ''
+      #!/usr/bin/env bash
+      set -euo pipefail
+
+      usage() {
+        echo "Usage: monitor-input <dp|usbc>" >&2
+        exit 1
+      }
+
+      [ $# -eq 1 ] || usage
+
+      case "$1" in
+        dp)    value=0x0f; label="DisplayPort" ;;
+        usbc)  value=0x11; label="USB-C" ;;
+        *)     usage ;;
+      esac
+
+      if ddcutil setvcp 60 "$value"; then
+        notify-send "Monitor Input" "Switched to $label"
+      else
+        notify-send -u critical "Monitor Input" "Failed to switch to $label"
+        exit 1
+      fi
+    '')","path":"home/hyprland.nix","commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

This script is specific to a particular hardware setup (`weller` host with a Dell U4025QW monitor). Including it in the general `home/hyprland.nix` module makes it available on all hosts that import this module, even those without the necessary hardware or `ddcutil` setup, where it would be non-functional. It's better to isolate hardware-specific configurations. I recommend moving this script and the corresponding keybindings on lines 247-248 to a new, host-specific home-manager module for `weller`.","created_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388667","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388667"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":null,"original_start_line":78,"start_side":"RIGHT","line":null,"original_line":104,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":30,"position":1,"subject_type":"line"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388670","pull_request_review_id":3963573319,"id":2949388670,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzBl-","diff_hunk":"@@ -215,6 +243,10 @@
         "$mainMod SHIFT, G, Record GIF, exec, record-gif"
         "$mainMod SHIFT, S, Stop recording, exec, pkill --signal SIGINT wf-recorder"
 
+        # Monitor input switching (DDC/CI)
+        "$mainMod ALT, 1, Switch monitor to DisplayPort, exec, monitor-input dp"
+        "$mainMod ALT, 2, Switch monitor to USB-C, exec, monitor-input usbc"","path":"home/hyprland.nix","commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

As with the `monitor-input` script on lines 78-104, these keybindings are hardware-specific and should be moved to a configuration module that is only applied to the `weller` host. This keeps the common `hyprland.nix` configuration clean and host-agnostic.","created_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388670","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388670"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388670"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388670/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":null,"original_start_line":247,"start_side":"RIGHT","line":null,"original_line":248,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":41,"position":1,"subject_type":"line"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388674","pull_request_review_id":3963573319,"id":2949388674,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzBmC","diff_hunk":"@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# DDC/CI monitor control – allows software to read/write monitor settings
+# (input source, brightness, contrast, etc.) over the I2C bus using ddcutil.
+{
+  config,
+  lib,
+  pkgs,
+  ...
+}:
+
+let
+  cfg = config.modules.ddcci;
+in
+{
+  options.modules.ddcci = {
+    enable = lib.mkEnableOption "DDC/CI monitor control via ddcutil";
+  };
+
+  config = lib.mkIf cfg.enable {
+    # Load the i2c-dev kernel module so userspace can talk to monitors
+    boot.kernelModules = [ "i2c-dev" ];
+
+    # ddcutil ships a udev rule that grants the i2c group access to /dev/i2c-*
+    services.udev.packages = [ pkgs.ddcutil ];
+
+    # Add ddcutil to system packages for interactive use
+    environment.systemPackages = [ pkgs.ddcutil ];
+
+    # Ensure the default user is in the i2c group for non-root DDC/CI access
+    users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.extraGroups = [ "i2c" ];","path":"modules/common/ddcci.nix","commit_id":"f14b0eb15aeb9f98d9afe518ca0ddfb03c1b443c","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

While the udev rule for `ddcutil` assigns device nodes to the `i2c` group, it doesn't guarantee the group itself exists on the system. To make this module more robust and self-contained, it's good practice to explicitly create the group before adding users to it.

```
    # Ensure the i2c group exists for the udev rule
    users.groups.i2c = {};

    # Ensure the default user is in the i2c group for non-root DDC/CI access
    users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.extraGroups = [ "i2c" ];
```","created_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388674","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388674"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388674"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388674/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":31,"original_start_line":28,"start_side":"RIGHT","line":32,"original_line":29,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":29,"position":32,"subject_type":"line"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949398970","pull_request_review_id":3963583307,"id":2949398970,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzEG6","diff_hunk":"@@ -75,6 +75,34 @@
       grim -g "$REGION" - | swappy -f -
     '')
 
+    # Monitor input switching via DDC/CI (Dell U4025QW)
+    # VCP code 0x60 = Input Source. Values are monitor-specific;
+    # run `ddcutil capabilities` and `ddcutil getvcp 60` to discover them.
+    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "monitor-input" ''
+      #!/usr/bin/env bash
+      set -euo pipefail
+
+      usage() {
+        echo "Usage: monitor-input <dp|usbc>" >&2
+        exit 1
+      }
+
+      [ $# -eq 1 ] || usage
+
+      case "$1" in
+        dp)    value=0x0f; label="DisplayPort" ;;
+        usbc)  value=0x11; label="USB-C" ;;
+        *)     usage ;;
+      esac
+
+      if ddcutil setvcp 60 "$value"; then
+        notify-send "Monitor Input" "Switched to $label"
+      else
+        notify-send -u critical "Monitor Input" "Failed to switch to $label"
+        exit 1
+      fi
+    '')","path":"home/hyprland.nix","commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"patflynn","id":7862557,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc4NjI1NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7862557?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/patflynn/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"Addressed [{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667","pull_request_review_id":3963573319,"id":2949388667,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzBl7","diff_hunk":"@@ -75,6 +75,34 @@
       grim -g "$REGION" - | swappy -f -
     '')
 
+    # Monitor input switching via DDC/CI (Dell U4025QW)
+    # VCP code 0x60 = Input Source. Values are monitor-specific;
+    # run `ddcutil capabilities` and `ddcutil getvcp 60` to discover them.
+    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "monitor-input" ''
+      #!/usr/bin/env bash
+      set -euo pipefail
+
+      usage() {
+        echo "Usage: monitor-input <dp|usbc>" >&2
+        exit 1
+      }
+
+      [ $# -eq 1 ] || usage
+
+      case "$1" in
+        dp)    value=0x0f; label="DisplayPort" ;;
+        usbc)  value=0x11; label="USB-C" ;;
+        *)     usage ;;
+      esac
+
+      if ddcutil setvcp 60 "$value"; then
+        notify-send "Monitor Input" "Switched to $label"
+      else
+        notify-send -u critical "Monitor Input" "Failed to switch to $label"
+        exit 1
+      fi
+    '')","path":"home/hyprland.nix","commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

This script is specific to a particular hardware setup (`weller` host with a Dell U4025QW monitor). Including it in the general `home/hyprland.nix` module makes it available on all hosts that import this module, even those without the necessary hardware or `ddcutil` setup, where it would be non-functional. It's better to isolate hardware-specific configurations. I recommend moving this script and the corresponding keybindings on lines 247-248 to a new, host-specific home-manager module for `weller`.","created_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388667","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388667"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388667/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":null,"original_start_line":78,"start_side":"RIGHT","line":null,"original_line":104,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":30,"position":1,"subject_type":"line"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388670","pull_request_review_id":3963573319,"id":2949388670,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzBl-","diff_hunk":"@@ -215,6 +243,10 @@

+# DDC/CI monitor control – allows software to read/write monitor settings
+# (input source, brightness, contrast, etc.) over the I2C bus using ddcutil.
+{
+  config,
+  lib,
+  pkgs,
+  ...
+}:
+
+let
+  cfg = config.modules.ddcci;
+in
+{
+  options.modules.ddcci = {
+    enable = lib.mkEnableOption "DDC/CI monitor control via ddcutil";
+  };
+
+  config = lib.mkIf cfg.enable {
+    # Load the i2c-dev kernel module so userspace can talk to monitors
+    boot.kernelModules = [ "i2c-dev" ];
+
+    # ddcutil ships a udev rule that grants the i2c group access to /dev/i2c-*
+    services.udev.packages = [ pkgs.ddcutil ];
+
+    # Add ddcutil to system packages for interactive use
+    environment.systemPackages = [ pkgs.ddcutil ];
+
+    # Ensure the default user is in the i2c group for non-root DDC/CI access
+    users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.extraGroups = [ "i2c" ];","path":"modules/common/ddcci.nix","commit_id":"f14b0eb15aeb9f98d9afe518ca0ddfb03c1b443c","original_commit_id":"86aceb68fd794bb2ddbb5ed26fe6303136d43f7d","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

While the udev rule for `ddcutil` assigns device nodes to the `i2c` group, it doesn't guarantee the group itself exists on the system. To make this module more robust and self-contained, it's good practice to explicitly create the group before adding users to it.

```
    # Ensure the i2c group exists for the udev rule
    users.groups.i2c = {};

    # Ensure the default user is in the i2c group for non-root DDC/CI access
    users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.extraGroups = [ "i2c" ];
```","created_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:27:01Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388674","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388674"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/355#discussion_r2949388674"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/355"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949388674/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":31,"original_start_line":28,"start_side":"RIGHT","line":32,"original_line":29,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":29,"position":32,"subject_type":"line"},{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/2949398970","pull_request_review_id":3963583307,"id":2949398970,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk86vzEG6","diff_hunk":"@@ -75,6 +75,34 @@
